title: podmanv2 container exists|wait
body:
enable container exists and wait for podmanv2

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Is there a way we could get the test suite to run against these.  At some point we want to fire up the tests to make sure podman container exists is actually working.

> Is there a way we could get the test suite to run against these. At some point we want to fire up the tests to make sure podman container exists is actually working.

No and then yes, agree. We need enough function to be able to run the test suite first.
